-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A%09%22unicode%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc vogal(c rune) bool %7B%0A%09c = unicode.ToLower(c)%0A%0A%09return c == 'a' %7C%7C c == 'e' %7C%7C c == 'i' %7C%7C c == 'o' %7C%7C c == 'u'%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc gagueja(p string) string %7B%0A%0A%09r := %5B%5Drune(p)%0A%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C len(r)-1; i++ %7B%0A%0A%09%09if vogal(r%5Bi%5D) && !vogal(r%5Bi+1%5D) %7B%0A%0A%09%09%09silaba := string(r%5B:i+1%5D)%0A%0A%09%09%09return silaba + silaba + p%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09return p%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09reader := bufio.NewReader(os.Stdin)%0A%0A%09texto, _ := reader.ReadString('%5Cn')%0A%0A%09palavra := %22%22%0A%0A%09for _, c := range texto %7B%0A%0A%09%09if unicode.IsLetter(c) %7B%0A%09%09%09palavra += string(c)%0A%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%0A%09%09%09if palavra != %22%22 %7B%0A%09%09%09%09fmt.Print(gagueja(palavra))%0A%09%09%09%09palavra = %22%22%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%0A%09%09%09fmt.Printf(%22%25c%22, c)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09if palavra != %22%22 %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Print(gagueja(palavra))%0A%09%7D
